worldgen.outline: Designing the world and its regions with AI…

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: There was an error loading this view. Reload the page to continue.

update.title: New version available
update.description: Refresh to get the latest changes.
update.confirm_description: Refreshing reloads the page. If you're in the middle of something unsaved (creating or editing content, taking an assessment, etc.), you could lose that progress. Save first and refresh when you're done.

welcome.subtitle: A learning experience built for agents in Colombia, Mexico and Argentina. Lessons, simulations and metrics in one place.
welcome.error_unconfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.

land.features_subtitle: Content, practice and data in a single experience, built for high-volume contact teams.
land.f1_desc: Learn by doing, with modules, videos with questions and quizzes per section.
land.f2_desc: Practice real calls and multiple choice with instant AI feedback.
land.f3_desc: Levels, XP, achievements and rankings that keep the team engaged.
land.f4_desc: Compete in real time, Kahoot-style, with speed-based scoring.
land.f5_desc: Measure real mastery and certify every achievement with public verification.
land.f6_desc: Colombia, Mexico and Argentina, each campaign with its own content.
land.steps_title: From zero to expert in three steps
land.s1_desc: Interactive lessons and videos designed by your trainers.
land.s2_desc: AI simulations, quizzes and gamified worlds.
land.s3_desc: Measure your mastery, improve and prove your results.
land.cta_subtitle: Sign in and pick up where you left off.

deletion.pending_generic: Sent for superadmin approval and hidden.

confirm.title: Are you sure?

confirm.delete_module_desc: You are about to delete the module “{{title}}”. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.delete_section_desc: You are about to delete this section. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.delete_world_desc: You are about to delete the world “{{name}}” and all its content. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.delete_region_desc: You are about to delete the region “{{name}}” and all its levels. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.delete_level_desc: You are about to delete the level “{{name}}”. This action cannot be undone.

confirm.delete_quiz_desc: You are about to delete this quiz. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.delete_simulation_desc: You are about to delete “{{title}}”. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.delete_marker_desc: You are about to delete this marker.

confirm.delete_node_desc: You are about to delete this node.

confirm.delete_generic_desc: You are about to delete this item.

users.subtitle: Manage roles, campaigns and access.

users.courses_only_superadmin: Per-course progress detail is available to superadmin only.
users.no_courses_assigned: This user has no courses assigned.

users.reset_module_confirm: The module “{{module}}” will be reset: the learner must redo its activities. This can't be undone.
users.reset_activity_confirm: The activity “{{section}}” will be reset: the learner must redo it. This can't be undone.
users.reset_world_confirm: The world (game) progress for “{{course}}” will be reset. This can't be undone.

users.created_share: ✓ User created — hand over these credentials
users.pending_hint: The user hasn't set their own password yet.
users.optimize_photos_hint: Re-compress existing profile photos so they load faster and use less data.
users.optimize_photos_confirm: This will re-compress every user's profile photo (resized to 256px and replaced with lightweight versions). It may take a while depending on how many photos there are. Continue?
users.bulk_help: Upload a .xlsx or .csv with an 'email' column (required) and optionally 'display_name'. Each one is created with a temporary password you can hand over.
users.bulk_no_valid: No valid emails found in the file.
users.bulk_creds_hint: The file includes site, email and temporary password for each. They also stay available in the list as pending.

courses.title: Courses
courses.subtitle: Group modules into courses and assign them to campaigns or people.
courses.ai_create_hint: Upload a document and AI creates the course with a module and its world (regions + quizzes). Everything stays in draft so you can review it before publishing.
courses.ai_scanned: No text (scanned document) — it will be read with vision
courses.ai_step_outline: Analyzing the document and designing the module…
courses.ai_step_world: Generating the world and its levels…
courses.ai_world_toggle_hint: Builds a world with question quizzes from the course. Uses more AI; enable it only if you'll use it.
courses.ai_no_sections: AI could not generate the module content. Try a shorter document or try again.
courses.ai_created_error: Could not create the course with AI
courses.ai_started_bg: The course is being created in the background. You can keep browsing.
courses.world_quiz_error: Could not generate the world quizzes
courses.world_region_create_desc: This course already has a world. Create a region for “{{title}}” and generate its levels and quizzes with AI?
courses.world_create_desc: This course has no world yet. Create the world (as draft) with a region for “{{title}}” and generate its levels and quizzes with AI?
courses.confirm_delete_desc: Delete the course '{{title}}'? Modules are not deleted: they return to the campaign's general plan.
courses.empty_hint: Create your first course to group modules and assign them.
courses.results_hint: Module progress, best simulator score and certification status.
courses.results_empty: No learners with data for this course yet.

courses.cond_preview: To get certified, the learner must:

courses.sim_section_hint: Choose which scenarios belong to this course and when they unlock.
courses.world_gate_hint: The world is a game, separate from the simulator. Choose when learners can play it.
courses.world_gate_from_start_desc: Learners can enter the world anytime, without finishing the modules.
courses.world_gate_after_modules_desc: The world unlocks once the learner completes every module.
courses.world_gate_after_module_desc: The world unlocks when the learner completes the module you pick.
courses.world_gate_pick_module: Pick the module that unlocks it…
courses.world_gate_preview_from_start: The world will be available from day one.
courses.world_gate_preview_after_modules: The world will show as locked 🔒 until the learner completes every module.
courses.world_gate_preview_after_module: The world will show as locked 🔒 until “{{title}}” is completed.
courses.world_gate_preview_after_module_generic: The world will show as locked 🔒 until the module you pick above is completed.
courses.sim_none_in_course: No scenarios linked to this course yet.
courses.sim_unpublished_hint: This scenario is a draft: learners won't see it in the course until you publish it from its editor.
courses.sim_unpublished_warn_one: 1 linked scenario is unpublished. Learners won't see it until you publish it.
courses.sim_unpublished_warn_many: {{n}} linked scenarios are unpublished. Learners won't see them until you publish them.
courses.sim_published_ok: Scenario published. It's now visible to learners.
courses.sim_summary_none: No simulator · most courses don't need one
courses.sim_missing_scenarios_title: No scenarios linked to the simulator
courses.sim_missing_scenarios_warn: You enabled "Requires passing the simulator", but this course has no linked scenarios. No learner will be able to get certified until you add at least one below or turn off the requirement.
courses.field_description_ph: What will the participant learn in this course?
courses.field_catalog_hint: Anyone will be able to explore and take this course, besides those assigned.
courses.cover_preview_hint: This is how the cover will look on the course card before publishing.
courses.description_format_hint: Use the toolbar for bold, italics, headings or lists. Leave a blank line to separate paragraphs, and press Add space (or Enter a few times) for more room between texts.
courses.course_modules_hint: Define the order in which the learner will complete the content.
courses.no_modules: This course has no modules yet. Add existing modules or create a new one.

library.open_hint: Reuse modules from your campaign, even ones already in another course.
library.new_module_hint: Start a blank module or generate one with AI from a document.
library.title: Module library
library.subtitle: Add modules to “{{course}}”, including from other campaigns.
library.move_hint: Moves the module into this course. It leaves the library.
library.move_hint_relocate: Moves the SAME module here and removes it from its current course/campaign (no copy).
library.copy_hint: Creates an independent copy in this course. The original is untouched.
library.copied: A draft copy of “{{title}}” was created
library.copy_error: The module could not be copied
library.empty: No modules available to add. Create one to get started.
library.legend_copy: creates a new, independent module: editing it doesn't affect the original.
library.legend_move: moves the same module, without duplicating content.
library.duplicate_hint: Creates a copy of this module in this same course.
library.copy_of: Copy of “{{title}}”. It's independent: changes don't affect the original.
library.copy_of_deleted: Copy of a module that no longer exists. It's independent.

courses.assign_campaigns_hint: The course will be visible to every learner in the selected campaigns.
courses.assign_users_hint: Assign the course to specific people, regardless of their campaign.
courses.assign_campaigns_hint_public: Optional: make it mandatory for specific campaigns (it's already visible to everyone).
courses.assign_users_hint_public: Optional: make it mandatory for specific people (it's already visible to everyone).
courses.audience_public_desc: Any learner can see it and self-enroll from the catalog, regardless of their campaign.
courses.audience_restricted_desc: Only the campaigns and people you pick below will see it.
courses.draft_modules_notice: Some modules are drafts: learners won't see them until you publish them with the Publish button.
courses.publish_panel_hint: Choose what to publish. Learners only see what's published.
courses.world_optional_hint: optional · generated from the course modules
courses.world_sync_ok: World up to date: every module already has its region
courses.published_auto_assigned: Assigned to {{name}}: its learners can see it now.
courses.no_audience_warn: Published, but nobody can see it yet: assign it to a campaign or to people.
courses.missing_world: The world isn't published yet. The course is visible, but learners can't play the world until you publish it.
courses.missing_modules: Some modules aren't published. The course is visible, but those modules won't appear for learners.
courses.draft_notice_desc: While it's a draft no learner will see it, even if it's public or assigned. Publish it so it reaches them.
courses.field_shareable_hint: Other trainers can enroll their learners in this course. They join your real course, not a copy, so they always see your latest version. Only you can edit the content.
courses.shareable_needs_publish: Publish the course so other trainers can see and use it with their learners.
courses.move_campaign_hint: Relocate this course and all its content (modules, world and simulators) to another of your campaigns.
courses.move_campaign_confirm: The course and all its content (modules, world and simulators) will be moved to “{{name}}”. Continue?
courses.shared_hint: Enroll your learners in courses published by other campaigns. It is the same course: the owner keeps it updated.
courses.shared_empty: No trainer has shared courses yet.
courses.confirm_copy_desc: Copy '{{title}}' (with its modules) to your campaign? An independent copy you can edit will be created.

courses.view_as_learner_publish_first: Publish the course to view it as a learner

courses.recert_new_content_hint: Their certificate is still valid: it reflects the course as it was when they earned it. Publishing new modules does not invalidate it. If the new content matters, request recertification.
courses.recert_confirm_msg: The {{count}} certificates already issued will be flagged as outdated and learners will see they need to certify again. No certificate is deleted: existing ones remain valid and verifiable.
courses.recert_badge_requested_hint: The trainer requested recertification after this certificate was issued.
courses.recert_badge_expired_hint: The certificate passed its validity period.

simulations.loaded_hint: Review the data in "General", adjust what you need, and then save.
simulations.url_auto_long: Auto-generated from the title. Edit only if you need to customize it.

simulations.del_item_desc: This item will be removed from the simulation's evaluation. This action cannot be undone.
simulations.select_step: Select a step to edit it
simulations.max_turns_hint: Maximum number of exchanges between agent and customer.
simulations.course_hint: Assign this simulator to a course in the campaign. If you leave it empty, it stays available as standalone practice.
simulations.pass_score_hint: Percentage the learner must reach for this simulator to count toward the course certification.
simulations.fake_client_hint: This information appears on the agent's screen during the simulation.
simulations.name: Name

simulations.ph_summary: Brief description of what happens in this scenario...
simulations.ph_call_reason: E.g.: Complains about an extra charge on their internet bill

dialogue.what_client_says: What does the customer say here?

dialogue.no_answer_hint: What the customer says if the agent gives an incorrect answer.
dialogue.ph_client_retry: E.g.: Hello? Is anyone there? Can you help me?
dialogue.agent_keywords: Keywords in the agent's response (lowercase, no accents)
dialogue.no_match_go_to: If no route matches, go to:

choice.speaker: Speaker

choice.ph_message: Message that appears in the simulation...
choice.ph_close_message: Feedback to the agent when finishing...

ai_gen.generate_ai_sub: — Claude creates the full scenario from your description
ai_gen.improve_hint: Polishes the dialogue, fills in translations and slightly extends the scenario you already built.
ai_gen.translate_hint: Translates the current scenario into English and Portuguese. Do it at the end, once the Spanish is polished.
ai_gen.translate_now: Translate to English and Portuguese now
ai_gen.translate_now_hint: If you leave this unchecked, the scenario comes out in Spanish only (much faster) and you can translate it later with the “Translate to EN/PT” button, once it is polished.
ai_gen.length_hint: Approximate conversation moments. Longer is more realistic, but the AI takes more time.
ai_gen.note_reading_module: Reading the module content to use it as the basis for the scenario.
ai_gen.ph_prompt: E.g.: Customer upset because their bill has an extra charge they don't recognize. The agent must show empathy, identify the problem, and offer a solution or clarification...
ai_gen.prompt_hint: The more detailed the description, the better the result.
ai_gen.no_module_option: No module — use only the description

simulations.toast_slug_needs_title: Add a title to generate the identifier
simulations.toast_start_missing: The starting step does not exist

new_modal.title: New simulation
new_modal.subtitle: Choose the simulation type and how you want to create it
new_modal.type_q: What type of simulation do you want to create?
new_modal.type_dialogue_desc: The learner types free-form answers, as if handling a real call.
new_modal.type_choice_desc: The learner progresses by choosing among predefined, scored options.
new_modal.method_q: How do you want to create it?
new_modal.method_ai_desc: Describe the scenario and AI builds the full conversation. You can adjust it afterwards.
new_modal.method_manual_desc: Build the conversation step by step from scratch, with on-screen guidance.

simulations.manual_guide_dialogue: 1) Fill in the "General" data · 2) Build the conversation step by step (each step is something the customer says plus routes based on the agent's reply) · 3) Review the evaluation · 4) Save and publish.
simulations.manual_guide_choice: 1) Fill in the "General" data · 2) Build the conversation step by step (each step is a message with scored answer options) · 3) Save and publish.

import.formats: Word (.docx), PowerPoint (.pptx), Excel (.xlsx), PDF (.pdf) or text (.txt, .md)
import.ph_prompt: E.g.: Create a module for each product in the catalog. Focus on objections and closing.
import.bg_started: The module is being generated in the background. You can keep browsing; we'll notify you when it's done.
import.manual_mode_hint: Maximum fidelity to a procedure: keeps every step in order and inserts each step's capture. Use it for manuals with exact screenshots (analyzes more deeply; takes a bit longer).
import.bg_no_sections: The AI could not generate the module content.
import.subtitle: Upload a Word, Excel or PDF file. AI analyzes it and creates a module in 3 languages.
import.no_text_scanned: No text (scanned document) — it will be read with vision
import.no_insertable_figures: No insertable figures detected; pages will be used only for AI analysis.
import.manual_desc: Maximum fidelity to a procedure: keeps every step in order and inserts each step's screenshot. Use it for manuals with exact screenshots (analyzes more deeply; takes a bit longer).

progress_hub.title: Which progress do you want to review?
progress_hub.subtitle: Pick a view to load the data. You can switch views at any time.
progress_hub.worlds_desc: Learner advancement in the gamified worlds: completed levels, stars and risk status.
progress_hub.modules_desc: Module activity submissions pending review, with answer details and feedback.
progress_hub.modules_b2: Score and active time per module
progress_hub.hint: Data is only loaded when you select a view.
progress_hub.sim_desc: Performance in the practice simulators: score, empathy, checklist and call resolution.

feedback_panel.title: Learner Progress
feedback_panel.subtitle: Track progress in Worlds and completed levels.
feedback_panel.no_data_desc: No learners have progress in Worlds yet.
feedback_panel.risk_detail: They started but their average performance is below 60%.

trainer_panel.select_prompt: Select a submission from the panel to audit
trainer_panel.ph_observations: Write your observations here to guide the student on their successes or operational deviations...
trainer_panel.select_side: Select a submission from the side panel.
trainer_panel.review_before: Review the student's detailed answers before commenting.
trainer_panel.score_based: Score based on the overall submission
trainer_panel.no_json: No variables were retrieved from this simulation's JSON.
trainer_panel.tpl_excellent: Excellent performance, you've mastered the operation. Keep it up!
trainer_panel.tpl_review_errors: Good attempt. Review the cases you marked incorrectly and try again.
trainer_panel.tpl_keep_going: You're on the right track. Reinforce the key concepts to sharpen your results.
trainer_panel.tpl_needs_improvement: You need to review the material before continuing. Schedule a refresher session.
trainer_panel.confirm_desc: Your feedback will be saved and the submission will leave the pending list. Continue?
trainer_panel.saved_ok_desc: The feedback was sent to the learner.
trainer_panel.save_err_desc: An error occurred while submitting the evaluation. Please try again.
trainer_panel.all_caught_up_desc: There are no submissions pending evaluation.

arena.ph_quiz_desc: Describe the goal of this quiz...
arena.sections_hint: Questions are grouped in sets of {{size}} into sections (P1, P2…). Each section is a stop on the learner's map.

livequiz.subtitle: Interactive Kahoot-style sessions for your participants.
livequiz.share_pin: Share the PIN with participants and then start.
livequiz.finished_sub: Participants can see their final score.
livequiz.edit_locked: A quiz in progress can't be edited
livequiz.code_validity_hint: Once it expires, no one can join with this code. You can renew it anytime.

worlds.gen_topic_hint: AI creates the full world: regions, levels and one quiz per region.
worlds.gen_scope_hint: Choose how many levels each region has and how many questions each level has (default 6 questions = 2 sections of 3).
worlds.gen_min_score_hint: The learner must reach this percentage to pass each level. Default 80%. You can adjust it per level later.
worlds.gen_sections_hint: Each section is a stop (P1, P2…) on the journey with 3 questions → {{total}} questions per level.
worlds.cleanup_quizzes_desc: {{count}} quiz(zes) not assigned to any level in this world will be deleted. This can't be undone.
worlds.ai_gen_desc: AI creates this region's levels, each with its own quiz, from its content.
worlds.ai_gen_started: Generating levels in the background. You can keep working.
worlds.not_linked_hint: This world isn't linked to a course. Ideally a world is created from a course so the AI is grounded in its content.
worlds.course_linked_banner: This world is linked to a course. Each region is based on a course module, and the AI generates the levels using ONLY that module's content (no made-up facts). To add a new region, pick a course module.
worlds.not_linked_banner: This world isn't linked to a course, so the AI has no content to generate from without inventing. Create the world from a course ("Set up world" button) to generate levels with AI.
worlds.region_from_module: Base it on a course module
worlds.region_module_hint: The AI will generate the levels using this module's content, without inventing.
worlds.region_custom_hint: Without a module, levels can't be generated with AI (no content). Add levels manually.
worlds.gen_modules_hint: Creates one region + level + quiz (with AI) per selected module.
worlds.gen_topic_required: Enter a topic for the world
worlds.no_campaign_desc: You don't have a campaign assigned. Contact the superadmin.
worlds.access_denied_desc: This world does not belong to your campaign.
worlds.auto_save_hint: Changes are saved automatically and reflected on the learner's map.
worlds.regions_hint: Regions group levels. The learner completes them in order.
worlds.no_regions_hint: Create a region to start adding levels
worlds.no_levels_hint: This region has no levels. Add the first level.
worlds.quiz_none_yet: No quizzes yet. Create one with “Create new quiz”.
worlds.quiz_pick_or_create: Reuse an unused quiz from this world, or create a new one.
worlds.quiz_pick_edit_create: Pick a quiz (you can reuse the same one across levels), edit the selected one, or create a new one.
worlds.bulk_cta_more: {{count}} course module(s) still without a region
worlds.bulk_cta_desc: AI creates one region per module and generates its levels and questions from the content. Everything stays editable.
worlds.bulk_modal_desc: {{count}} regions will be created (one per module) and AI will generate their levels and questions from each module's content.
worlds.bulk_modal_hint: Applies to each region. You can adjust levels individually afterwards.
worlds.bulk_progress_hint: You can close this window; generation continues in the background.
worlds.preview_title: This is how the journey will look
worlds.title: Worlds
worlds.ph_world_desc: Describe the context or purpose of this world...
worlds.ph_mission_desc: Describe the goal of this mission...
worlds.wiz_name_q: What will your world be called?
worlds.wiz_hint_new: After creating it you'll build its regions and levels. You can change all of this later.
worlds.wiz_hint_edit: This is the name your learners will see. You can change it whenever you want.
worlds.toast_choose_campaign: Choose a campaign for the world
worlds.lm_toast_delete_rls: The mission could not be deleted: the database rejected the operation (RLS permissions). Notify the superadmin.

modules.import_ai_hint: Upload a document and AI generates a module from it

be.body_tip: Separate paragraphs with a blank line. For complex content use individual blocks.

be.pdf_required: Required review to complete the module
be.pdf_type_error: The file must be a PDF.

be.ge_ph_instructions_sort: E.g.: Drag the steps into the correct order
be.ge_ph_msg_correct: Message on success (e.g.: Excellent! That is the correct order.)

new.ph_prompt: E.g.: Module on handling objections in telephone sales. Covers active listening techniques, how to counter price and time objections, and how to close the call positively even without a sale...

step_titles.intro_s: Review your mission before accessing the system

step_titles.sla_s: Validate your knowledge of the service agreements

log.title: ▶ SYSTEM LOG — GLPI SIM
log.ticket_closed: Ticket validated and closed by the user

toast.desc_min: ❌ The description must be at least 20 characters
toast.fields_red: ❌ Check the fields marked in red
toast.first_asistencia: ℹ️ First go to Assistance → Service Catalog
toast.save_error: ❌ Could not save your progress, please try again

briefing.p_a: The AMADEUS system at counter 13-16 has a
briefing.p_b: : the ATB printers don't respond and agents can't issue boarding passes. You must register a ticket in GLPI 11 following the official procedure.
briefing.item_mission_desc: Create a ticket in GLPI to report the failure in the AMADEUS system
briefing.item_type_desc: Critical failure — direct impact on airport operations
briefing.item_sla_desc: Response time: 5 minutes — Resolution time: 24 hours

login.instruction: Access GLPI using your assigned username and the internal database. Complete the 3 fields correctly.

crear.select_asistencia_hint: Select "Assistance" in the left menu to continue.
crear.amadeus_desc: Ask for support from our helpdesk team.
crear.form_opened: ✅ Form opened! Proceed to the next step to fill it out.

campos.instruction: Complete the Reporte_Amadeus form with the correct data for the counter 13-16 incident at NLU.
campos.type_hint: 💡 Failure in an existing system = Incident
campos.inctype_hint: 💡 Serious interruption affecting operations = Critical failure
campos.desc_placeholder: Explain what happened, what you were doing when the error occurred...
campos.sent_sub: Your form has been submitted successfully.

seguimiento.instruction_b: to see your tickets. Click the active ticket to see its detail.
seguimiento.r1_sub: Airline reports ATB printer not responding
seguimiento.detail_desc: NLU-COUNTER 13,16-CK-REPORT / Airline reports the ATB printer doesn't print. AMADEUS system unresponsive on all counter instances.
seguimiento.support_msg: Case assigned. Technician on the way to the counter. ETA: 15 minutes.
seguimiento.validation_q: The technician has marked this ticket as Resolved. Was the problem completely solved?
seguimiento.fb_fail: ⚠️ Remember: Rejecting reopens the ticket and the technician must keep working. Only reject if the problem persists.
seguimiento.fb_ok: ✅ Correct. By approving, the ticket is permanently closed. The support cycle completes successfully.

q1.q: Q1 · 🚨 An airline check-in system fails completely. Passengers can't board. What type of incident is it and what is the response time?
q1.ok: ✅ A critical failure has High impact: 5 min to respond and 24 hrs to resolve.
q1.fail: ❌ Failures that directly interrupt operations are "Critical failure" with High impact — 5 minutes.

q2.q: Q2 · 🎫 When creating a ticket in GLPI, what is the correct navigation path from the main menu?
q2.ok: ✅ The official path is: Assistance → Service Catalog → Reporte_Amadeus.
q2.fail: ❌ The correct path is Assistance → Service Catalog → Reporte_Amadeus.

q3.q: Q3 · 🏢 An Aeromexico operator reports the system prints duplicate invoices at domestic gates. What do you select in "Reported by"?
q3.ok: ✅ Since an airline operator is reporting, you must select "Airline" → Aeromexico.
q3.fail: ❌ Since an airline operator is reporting, you must select "Airline" → Aeromexico.

q4.q: Q4 · 📋 The technician marked your ticket as "Resolved" but the problem persists. What should you do?
q4.a: Approve the solution and create a new ticket
q4.b: Reject the solution with a comment — the ticket will reopen automatically
q4.c: Contact the supervisor without doing anything in GLPI
q4.d: Wait for the technician to contact you again
q4.ok: ✅ Rejecting the solution reopens the ticket so the technician can keep working.
q4.fail: ❌ If the problem persists, you must reject the solution with a comment.
